hero.tagline: I craft beautiful, fast & accessible digital experiences — from pixel-perfect UIs to robust backend systems.

about.title: About Me
about.p1: Hi! I'm a passionate IT student and problem-solver who builds things for the web and beyond. I love crafting elegant interfaces with a sharp focus on performance and user experience.
about.p2: With a background in both design and engineering, I bridge the gap between beautiful aesthetics and robust code.
about.p3: When I'm not coding, you'll find me exploring generative art, contributing to open-source, or hunting for the perfect cup of coffee ☕

education.title: Education
education.qcu_desc: Majoring in IT with a focus on software development and web applications.
education.fatima_desc: Completed foundational STEM courses maintaining a strong academic record.
education.ux_desc: 12-week program covering UX research, Figma prototyping, and usability testing.

experience.title: Experience
experience.tc_desc: Led redesign of flagship SaaS dashboard, reducing load time by 62%. Mentored 3 junior developers and established the component library used across 5 products.
experience.sx_desc: Built the customer-facing app from scratch for a Series A fintech startup. Integrated 3 payment APIs and real-time notifications via WebSockets.
experience.ag_desc: Developed 12+ client websites with pixel-perfect responsive layouts and automated CI/CD deployment pipelines.

projects.title: Projects
projects.lp_desc: No-code landing page builder with drag-and-drop blocks, live preview, and one-click Vercel deploy. 1,200+ beta users.
projects.mm_desc: AI-powered knowledge graph connecting concepts from your notes using embeddings and a force-directed graph UI.
projects.dp_desc: Real-time analytics dashboard ingesting 50k+ events/sec via Kafka, visualized with custom WebGL charts.
projects.ps_desc: Collaborative pixel art editor with real-time multiplayer via WebRTC. Featured on Product Hunt.
projects.vp_desc: E2E encrypted password manager with zero-knowledge architecture, TOTP support, and browser extension.
projects.et_desc: Carbon footprint tracker with gamification mechanics. Won 1st place at a climate-tech hackathon.

contact.title: Let's Talk
contact.tagline: Have a project in mind, or just want to say hello? My inbox is always open.

chat.title: Ask about Clarence
chat.subtitle: Powered by Gemini AI
chat.greeting: Hi! I'm an AI that knows everything about Clarence. Ask me about his skills, projects, experience, or anything else.
